calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Of Sale Of Dwelling Or, Alternatively, For Issuance Of An Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Dec-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Timothy C. Wilson, Esq., of Aaron & Wilson, LLP, (415) 438-7802, specially appeared for Plaintiff and Moving Party
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MAX RAZO'S Motion For Order Of Sale Of Dwelling Or, Alternatively, For Issuance Of An Order To Show Cause is granted. Order signed in open court. (301/PJB/) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR# 11604

Order To Show Cause Why An Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue
Off Calendar Oct-11-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Timothy C. Wilson of Aaron & Wilson, LLP, 438-7802, appearing for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. Mr. Wilson's request for a continuance was denied. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Max Razo's Order to Show Cause Why an Order for Sale of Dwelling Should Not Issue is denied. Proof of service is not valid. "I caused" does not show personal knowledge and service on the occupants was not done as required by the Order to Show Cause. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-13-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Robert Bone, Esq. for Plaintiff: Max Razo, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Michael Younessian ind. and Mortgate America, Inc.
Matter submitted and taken under submission.
Proposed Judgment received in court.

Jan. 13, 2006
Judgment granted and sined by Comm. Kaplan, see scanned doc.
